prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 1HD-FTE 4.2L turbo-diesel inline-6 (found in the Land Cruiser 80/100 series) with a Garrett GT4202 turbocharger, custom intercooler piping, and a Paccar MX-13 fuel system upgrade for sustained 450+ hp at 2,800 RPM with 850+ lb-ft torque

Full drivetrain reinforcement: R151F 5-speed manual transmission (from Hino Ranger) with a Sachs twin-disc clutch, custom driveshafts from Driveshaft Shop, and a Toyota Mega Cruiser 8.0L transfer case for 4WD capability with ARB Air Locker differentials
Custom ECU tuning via MoTeC M190 with dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps, 2000cc injectors from Denso, and a custom water-methanol injection system from Snow Performance for EGT control under sustained load
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny-inspired widebody kit (custom-fabricated for Coaster dimensions) with carbon fiber fender flares, front splitter, and rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon

Custom 22-inch Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (8.5J front, 10J rear) with Toyo Open Country M/T tires (285/35R22 front, 315/30R22 rear) and Air Lift Performance 3P air suspension for adjustable ride height
Full interior overhaul with Recaro Pole Position seats (x12), custom roll cage by Custom Cages UK, and a full digital dash from AIM MXS Strada with integrated MoTeC logging
